summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of KingdomCraft maintenance page. All core features working correctly across desktop, tablet, and mobile devices.
passed_tests: Main page loads correctly with dark theme by default
Countdown timer shows days, hours, minutes, seconds and updates properly
Language toggle (PL/EN) successfully changes page texts
Theme toggle (dark/light) successfully changes page colors
Social media buttons (Discord, TikTok, YouTube) are visible and clickable
Rules link navigates correctly to /rules page
Rules page displays all 6 server rules properly
Back button on rules page returns to main page
Responsive design works correctly on desktop (1920x1080)
Responsive design works correctly on tablet (768x1024)
Responsive design works correctly on mobile (390x844)
All interactive elements have proper test IDs
Language context persists across page navigation
Theme context persists across page navigation
